prompt: Create a multi-screen WhatsApp Flow for a restaurant menu. Screen 1 should use a NavigationList (v6.2+) to show categories (Starters, Main, Dessert). Clicking a category should navigate to Screen 2. Screen 2 should show the items in that category using a Dropdown. Screen 2 should also include a Footer. Ensure the Flow uses version 7.1. Provide flow.json and a Python backend.

assertions.name: navigation_list_exclusive
assertions.instruction: Screen 1 MUST contain a NavigationList and NO other components (exclusive component rule).

assertions.name: footer_requirement
assertions.instruction: Screen 2 MUST include a Footer component as it is a terminal screen (or has a complete action).

assertions.name: data_exchange_trigger_present
assertions.instruction: The flow.json MUST include 'data_exchange_trigger' if data_exchange is used.
